about-who.title: Who we are?
about-who.text1: The BENELUX Chamber of Commerce in Uzbekistan serves as a bridge between companies from the BENELUX region and Uzbekistan. We promote business cooperation, investment opportunities and knowledge exchange to strengthen long-term economic partnerships.
about-who.text2: The BENELUX Chamber of Commerce in Uzbekistan serves as a bridge between companies from the BENELUX region and Uzbekistan. We promote business cooperation, investment opportunities and knowledge exchange to strengthen long-term economic partnerships.
